revision.comment: Created page with " {{Navbox | name = User:Immanuelle/Iki Shrines | title = Shrines in Iki | listclass = hlist |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Amanotanagao Shrine|ja|天手長男神社|simple}} * {{ill|Iki Gokoku Shrine|ja|壱岐神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Iki_Gokoku_Shrine|en:draft}} * {{ill|Kō Shrine|ja|興神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kō_Shrine|en:draft}} * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Shrine (Iki City)|en|lt=Sumiyoshi Shrine}} * {{ill|Shoumogu|ja|聖母宮}} * {{ill|Tsukiyomi-jinja (Iki..."
added [[Category:Oki Province]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
